# Wisdom Wealth International School (WWIS)

Wisdom Wealth International School (WWIS) is an international school in Trichy, Tamil Nadu. WWIS follows Cambridge International Education (CIE) and is built around the promise: "Schools focus on class. WWIS focuses on the individual child."

## Website

Live site: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app

## Key Pages

- Home: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/
- About Us: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/about
- Our Programs: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/our-programs
- Our Team: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/our-team
- Careers: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/careers
- Blog: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/blog
- Find Us: https://worldnews2025.vercel.app/find-us

## Programs And Learning

- iPlay: Pre-KG to Grade 2, learning through play, social and emotional development, early communication, 24 skills, 3 languages, and brain development.
- iDiscover: Grade 3 to Grade 7, curiosity-driven learning, problem-solving, exploration, creativity, 24 projects, and professional skill development.
- iLead: Grade 8 to Grade 12, leadership, collaboration, innovation, future readiness, career awareness, and internships.
- Cambridge CIE: international standards, strong concepts, critical thinking, communication skills, and global citizenship.
- Individual Learning Plan (ILP): personalised learning goals, teacher guidance, progress tracking, and student talent development.

## About Us Sections

- Teaching Methodology
- Our Syllabus - Cambridge International Education (CIE)
- Daily Activities of Your Child
- Individual Learning Plan (ILP)
- Student Achievements

## Admissions

Admissions are open from Pre-KG to higher grades based on seat availability. Age criteria should be confirmed with the admissions office.

Process: Inquiry -> Campus Visit -> Parent Counseling -> Student Assessment if applicable -> Document Submission -> Fee Payment -> Enrollment Confirmation -> Orientation.

The public admission form is not embedded on the website. The Apply for Admission button is prepared for a secure private form link that will be added later.

## Facilities, Events, Gallery, And Policies

Facilities include smart classrooms, science labs, computer labs, library, sports facilities, activity rooms, transport services, medical room, auditorium, play areas, safety systems, and CCTV monitoring.

The site uses labelled placeholders for all image positions, including hero images, event images, gallery images, team photo, career images, CIE images, program images, and activity images. Real approved WWIS media can be uploaded later without changing layout.

School policies, parent handbook, uniform information, calendar, circulars, transport details, forms, and exam schedules should be confirmed directly with WWIS.
